business_logic.description: This job fetches the current Bitcoin/USDT exchange rate from the Binance API every 5 seconds.

actions.description: Send a GET request to the Binance API to retrieve the current price of Bitcoin in USDT.
Process the API response to extract the current exchange rate.
Update the bitcoin_usdt_rate_entity with the fetched exchange rate.
Log the fetched rate into the rate_history_entity for historical tracking.

error_handling.description: In case of failure to fetch the data, log the error and set a flag to retry on the next interval.
